step_by_step_thinking: From the retrieved articles, we see that gingival inflammation, gingival ablation, and gingival abrasion could potentially contribute to gingival recession due to their direct effects on the gingival tissue. On the contrary, drug-induced gingival overgrowth leads to an exaggerated gingival proliferation rather than recession. Therefore,
raw_response:
From the retrieved articles, we see that gingival inflammation, gingival ablation, and gingival abrasion could potentially contribute to gingival recession due to their direct effects on the gingival tissue. On the contrary, drug-induced gingival overgrowth leads to an exaggerated gingival proliferation rather than recession. Therefore,
\boxed{D}
